title: HistoWeave: reproducible spatial transcriptomics orchestration and evaluation platform
description: HistoWeave is an open-source orchestration and evaluation platform for reproducible spatial transcriptomics. Release v0.1.0 freezes the plugin registry with 10 scientifically validated and 3 contract-validated multi-dataset evidence packages (13 total), task contracts, honest recommendation baselines, and reproducible landscapes.
notes: Canonical validation ledger: 10 scientific validated + 3 contract_validated = 13 multi-dataset evidence packages (see src/histoweave/plugins/builtin/release_manifest.py).
